title: Stop Fixing Your Claude Skills. Autoresearch Does It For You
summary: Nick Saraev demonstrates how to automatically improve Claude Code skills by combining Karpathy's autoresearch principles with evals. The approach provides a step-by-step walkthrough for practitioners to optimize their own LLM-based skills through automated evaluation and refinement.
